en: I gotta ask, are you upset with me or are you... What's that? You alright? You seem
upset. No man, we're good, whatever. Alright. Uh, well... Sure. Honestly, I was told I was
presenting alone, so... It's fine, you know what I mean? Obviously I've been recast into
some kind of Joe Biden, Andy Richter, Robin type role. It's fine, I'm here for the movie.
ko: 괜찮아, 내 말 알지? 분명히 나는 어떤 조 바이든, 앤디 리히터, 로빈 같은 역할로 다시 캐스팅된 거야, 괜찮아, 나는 영화를 위해 여기 있어.

en: No, I'm here to support you, so if you want to... No, really, you just go. There you go.
ko: 아니, 괜찮아, 나는 너를 지원하러 왔어, 그러니까 원하면... 오, 그거 좋네. 정말로.

en: Take the high road, I look petty. Classic Brad. It's just classic, classic Brad. Alright,
ko: 전형적인 브래드, 그냥 전형적이야, 전형적인 브래드.

en: well, how would you, uh, how would you like to move forward? Well, I'd like to at least
read the winner, okay? We're not announcing the winner. There's not even a winner? Oh
man, this is a disaster, this is like a Montessori type of thing, everyone gets a trophy, you

en: know, nobody's feelings are hurt, come on. There's gonna be a winner, we're just, we're
ko: 수상자는 있을 거야, 우리는 소개를 발표하러 왔어, 응.
